MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON DEC-10-2015 IN 206, DEFENDANT NEWEGG, INC., MAGNELL ASSOCIATE, INC., AND ROSEWILL, INC.'S MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL IS GRANTED. THE TRIAL DATE OF 1/19/16 IS CONTINUED TO 5/16/16 IN DEPT. 206 AT 9:30 AM. ALL OTHER TRIAL-RELATED DEADLINES SET BY THE CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE, INCLUDING EXPERT DESIGNATION, FACT AND EXPERT DISCOVERY CUTOFF, DISCOVERY MOTION AND SUMMARY JUDGMENT MOTION CUTOFFS, AND ALL OTHER TRIAL-RELATED DEADLINES, ARE CONTINUED IN ACCORDANCE WITH THE NEW TRIAL DATE. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: JOHN K. STEWART; CLERK: JIROQUE; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
